nasb.text: but he who paid no regard to the word of the Lord left his servants and his livestock in the field.

esv.text: but whoever did not pay attention to the word of the Lord left his slaves and his livestock in the field.

cnv.text: 但那不把耶和華這話放在心上的，卻把他的僕人和牲畜留在田裡。

ccb.text: 但那些不把耶和华的话放在心上的，仍把他们的奴仆和牲畜留在田间。
